Is Walkable
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio
Step 1: Trace downward from the foot location to find the geometry. If the surface is walkable, save the Impact Location and Normal.
nodes.comment: Step 1: Trace downward from the foot location to find the geometry. If the surface is walkable, save the Impact Location and Normal.

nodes.title: Step 1.1: Find the difference in location from the Impact point and the expected (flat) floor location. These values are offset by the nomrmal multiplied by the foot height to get better behavior on angled surfaces.
nodes.comment: Step 1.1: Find the difference in location from the Impact point and the expected (flat) floor location. These values are offset by the nomrmal multiplied by the foot height to get better behavior on angled surfaces.

nodes.title: Step 2: Interp the Current Location Offset to the new target value. Interpolate at different speeds based on whether the new target is above or below the current one.
nodes.comment: Step 2: Interp the Current Location Offset to the new target value. Interpolate at different speeds based on whether the new target is above or below the current one.

nodes.title: Step 3: Interp the Current Rotation Offset to the new target value.
nodes.comment: Step 3: Interp the Current Rotation Offset to the new target value.

nodes.title:
Get Curve Value
La destinazione è Istanza animazione
Only update Foot IK offset values if the Foot IK curve has a weight. If it equals 0, clear the offset values.
nodes.comment: Only update Foot IK offset values if the Foot IK curve has a weight. If it equals 0, clear the offset values.

nodes.title: Step 1.2: Calculate the Rotation offset by getting the Atan2 of the Impact Normal.
nodes.comment: Step 1.2: Calculate the Rotation offset by getting the Atan2 of the Impact Normal.
